modules.name: audio
modules.description:
`lurek.audio` â€” Audio playback, mixing, MIDI synthesis, and DSP effects.

Registers sources (streamed or static), bus-based mixing, MIDI playback,
streaming decoders, `SoundData` buffers, and spatial audio positioning.
All mixer state lives in [`SharedState`].

functions.name: newSource
functions.description: Loads an audio file and returns a Source handle.

functions.name: play
functions.description: Plays a source, with optional bus routing via options table.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stops playback and resets seek position.

functions.name: setVolume
functions.description: Sets source playback volume.

functions.name: getVolume
functions.description: Returns the source volume.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pauses playback at the current position.

functions.name: resume
functions.description: Resumes playback from pause.

functions.name: setPitch
functions.description: Sets source pitch multiplier.

functions.name: getPitch
functions.description: Returns the source pitch multiplier.

functions.name: isPlaying
functions.description: Returns true if the source is playing.

functions.name: isPaused
functions.description: Returns true if the source is paused.

functions.name: isStopped
functions.description: Returns true if the source is stopped.

functions.name: setLooping
functions.description: Enables or disables looping.

functions.name: isLooping
functions.description: Returns true if looping is enabled.

functions.name: playLooping
functions.description: Plays the source in a continuous loop.

functions.name: setPan
functions.description: Sets stereo panning (-1.0 left to 1.0 right).

functions.name: getPan
functions.description: Returns the source stereo panning.

functions.name: setMasterVolume
functions.description: Sets the global master volume.

functions.name: getMasterVolume

functions.name: getActiveSourceCount

functions.name: getSourceCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of registered sources.

functions.name: getSourceType

functions.name: clone

functions.name: stopAll

functions.name: resumeAll

functions.name: release

functions.name: newBus

functions.name: setSourceBus
functions.description: Assigns a source to a bus.

functions.name: getSourceBus
functions.description: Returns the bus a source is assigned to, or nil.

functions.name: getMaxSources

functions.name: getDuration
functions.description: Returns the total duration of a source in seconds.

functions.name: tell

functions.name: seek
functions.description: Seeks to a time position in seconds.

functions.name: setLowpass

functions.name: setHighpass

functions.name: getLowpass

functions.name: getHighpass
functions.description: Returns the high-pass filter cutoff of a source.

functions.name: clearFilter

functions.name: fadeIn

functions.name: getFadeIn

functions.name: setListener2D

functions.name: getListener2D

functions.name: getListener

functions.name: getPosition

modules.name: automation
modules.description: `lurek.automation` â€” Automated input simulation via timed step scripts.

functions.name: load
functions.description: Loads a named script from a Lua data table containing a steps array.

functions.name: unload
functions.description: Removes a loaded script by name, returning true if it existed.

functions.name: hasScript
functions.description: Returns true if a script with the given name is registered.

functions.name: getScripts
functions.description: Returns an array of all registered script names.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Starts playback of the named script from the beginning.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stops playback and resets the simulator to idle.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pauses playback at the current step position.

functions.name: resume
functions.description: Resumes playback from a paused position.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Advances the playback clock by `dt` seconds, dispatching due steps.

functions.name: isRunning
functions.description: Returns true if the simulator is actively playing a script.

functions.name: isPaused
functions.description: Returns true if playback is currently paused.

functions.name: isComplete
functions.description: Returns true if all steps in the active script have been dispatched.

functions.name: getCurrentStep
functions.description: Returns the index of the next step to be dispatched.

functions.name: getStepCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of steps in the active script.

functions.name: getCurrentScript
functions.description: Returns the name of the active script, or nil if idle.

functions.name: getElapsedTime
functions.description: Returns seconds elapsed since playback started.

functions.name: loadFromToml
functions.description: Parses a TOML string and registers it as a named script.

functions.name: getStepLimit
functions.description: Returns the step limit for the named script, or nil if not found.

functions.name: setStepLimit
functions.description: Sets the step limit for the named script (clamped to 1..MAX_STEPS).

functions.name: saveMacro
functions.description: Saves a currently-loaded script under a macro name for fast replay.

functions.name: playMacro
functions.description: Loads and starts playback of a previously saved macro.

functions.name: hasMacro
functions.description: Returns true if a macro with the given name has been saved.

functions.name: listMacros
functions.description: Returns an array of all saved macro names.

functions.name: setPlaybackSpeed
functions.description: Sets the dt multiplier for script playback (0.5 = half speed, 2.0 = double).

functions.name: getPlaybackSpeed
functions.description: Returns the current playback speed multiplier (default 1.0).

functions.name: setHighlightMode
functions.description: Enables or disables the highlight overlay hint.

functions.name: isHighlightMode
functions.description: Returns whether the highlight overlay hint is active.

functions.name: waitUntil
functions.description: Pauses playback advancement until predicate() returns true or timeout seconds elapse.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.type: number -- maximum seconds to wait before auto-resuming

modules.name: camera
modules.description:
`lurek.camera` â€” Camera2D creation and manipulation for 2D viewport control.

Each `Camera2D` has position, zoom, rotation, viewport bounds, optional world-space
clamping, waypoint path following, smooth zoom tweening, per-layer parallax factors,
and screenâ†”world coordinate transforms.

functions.name: new
functions.description: Creates a new Camera2D with the given viewport dimensions.

functions.name: newCamera
functions.description: Creates a new 2D camera with the given viewport dimensions.

modules.name: compute
modules.description:
`lurek.compute` â€” Dense N-dimensional numerical arrays with NumPy-style operations.

Wraps [`NdArray`] as `Array` userdata supporting element-wise arithmetic, broadcasting,
reshape/transpose/slice, reduction (sum, mean, min, max), linear algebra (matmul, dot,
norm), spatial queries (nearest, radius search), and statistical analytics.

functions.name: newArray
functions.description: Creates a zero-initialized array with the given shape and optional dtype.

functions.name: zeros
functions.description: Creates a zero-filled array with the given shape and optional dtype.

functions.name: ones
functions.description: Creates a one-filled array with the given shape and optional dtype.

functions.name: range
functions.description: Creates a 1D array from start to stop with optional step and dtype.

functions.name: fromTable
functions.description: Creates an array from a Lua table of numbers with optional shape and dtype.

functions.name: gaussianKernel
functions.description: Creates a sizeĂ—size Gaussian kernel array.

functions.name: rotate2dMatrix
functions.description: Creates a 2Ă—2 rotation matrix for the given angle in radians.

functions.name: affine2d
functions.description: Creates a 3Ă—3 homogeneous affine matrix.

functions.name: fft
functions.description: Computes the discrete Fourier transform of a 1D real-valued sample array.

functions.name: ifft
functions.description: Computes the inverse discrete Fourier transform.

functions.name: fftMagnitude
functions.description: Returns the magnitude spectrum `|X[k]|` of a real-valued sample array.

modules.name: data
modules.description:
`lurek.data` — Binary data manipulation, compression, hashing, and encoding.

Provides struct-style `pack`/`unpack`, binary file I/O via `ByteData`/`DataView`,
compression (deflate, gzip, zstd, lz4), cryptographic and non-cryptographic hashing,
base64/hex encoding, TOML parsing, `RingBuffer`, and an ordered-map type.

functions.name: pack
functions.description: Packs values into a binary byte string using the format string.

functions.name: unpack
functions.description: Unpacks values from a binary byte string, returning values followed by next offset.

functions.name: getPackedSize
functions.description: Returns the number of bytes the given format and values would occupy.

functions.name: compress
functions.description: Compresses data using the given algorithm (deflate, gzip, lz4).

functions.name: decompress
functions.description: Decompresses data using the given algorithm (deflate, gzip, lz4).

functions.name: encode
functions.description: Encodes binary data using the given format (base64, hex).

functions.name: decode
functions.description: Decodes encoded text back to binary (base64, hex).

functions.name: hash
functions.description: Returns the cryptographic hash of the input (md5, sha1, sha256, sha512).

functions.name: crc32
functions.description: Returns the CRC-32 checksum of the input data as an integer.

functions.name: newByteData
functions.description: Instantiates a raw byte data container object.

functions.name: newDataView
functions.description: Creates a read-only windowed view into a byte string.

functions.name: write
functions.description: Writes values using the Lurek2D Binary Pack Format.

functions.name: read
functions.description: Reads values using the Lurek2D Binary Pack Format.

functions.name: size
functions.description: Returns the byte size of a Lurek2D Binary Pack Format string.

functions.name: parseToml
functions.description: Parses a TOML string into a Lua table.

functions.name: encodeToml
functions.description: Encodes a Lua table into a TOML string.

functions.name: newRingBuffer
functions.description: Creates a fixed-capacity ring buffer that can store any Lua value.

functions.name: toMsgPack
functions.description: Serializes a Lua value (table, string, number, boolean, or nil) to MessagePack binary.

functions.name: fromMsgPack
functions.description: Deserializes a MessagePack binary string back into a Lua value.

functions.name: newWriter
functions.description: Creates a new write-cursor for building binary data.

modules.name: dataframe
modules.description:
`lurek.dataframe` — Column-major tabular data with query, analytics, and SQL.

Exposes `DataFrame` (column-oriented table with filter, sort, group, join, pivot)
and `Database` (named collection of DataFrames with SQL query support). Supports
CSV/JSON serialization and aggregation functions (sum, mean, min, max, count).

functions.description: Creates a new empty DataFrame.

functions.name: newDatabase
functions.description: Creates a new empty Database.

functions.name: fromTable
functions.description: Creates a DataFrame from an array of row tables.

functions.name: fromCSV

functions.name: fromJSON
functions.description: Parses a JSON string into a DataFrame.

functions.name: fromBinary
functions.description: Deserializes a binary LVDF string into a DataFrame.

functions.name: random
functions.description: Generates a DataFrame with random data from column definitions.

functions.name: toVec
functions.description: Converts a DataFrame to a VecFrame for vectorized column operations.

functions.name: fromVec
functions.description: Converts a VecFrame back to a DataFrame.

modules.name: debugbridge
modules.description:
Registers the `lurek.debugbridge.*` TCP debug server API.

Embeds a JSON-over-TCP server (127.0.0.1 only) inside the running game.
External tools (VS Code extension, MCP server) connect to inspect and
control the game at runtime. Network I/O runs on a background thread;
Lua-dependent methods are queued and dispatched via `poll()` on the main thread.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start the TCP debug server on 127.0.0.1:port.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stop the TCP debug server and close all connections.

functions.name: isRunning
functions.description: Returns whether the server is currently running.

functions.name: getPort
functions.description: Returns the server port (0 if not running).

functions.name: getClientCount
functions.description: Returns the number of connected TCP clients.

functions.name: poll
functions.description: Poll for pending Lua-dependent requests from TCP clients.

functions.name: capturePrint
functions.description: Captures a print message and broadcasts it to connected clients.

functions.name: getPrintHistory
functions.description: Returns the print history.

functions.name: clearPrintHistory
functions.description: Clears the print history.

functions.name: setMaxPrintHistory
functions.description: Sets the maximum print history size.

functions.name: getPerformance
functions.description: Returns performance statistics.

functions.name: requestScreenshot
functions.description: Flags a screenshot request for the next frame.

functions.name: isScreenshotRequested
functions.description: Returns whether a screenshot is currently requested.

functions.name: broadcast
functions.description: Broadcasts a JSON event to all connected clients.

modules.name: devtools
modules.description:
Registers the `lurek.devtools.*` runtime diagnostics and developer-tools API.

Thin Lua bridge that delegates to the [`devtools`][crate::devtools] domain module.
All state management happens in [`crate::devtools`]; this file only converts
between Lua values and domain types.

modules.name: docs
modules.description:
Registers the `lurek.docs.*` documentation management API.

Provides engine-integrated documentation management: scanning runtime bindings,
loading TOML doc catalogs, validating completeness, computing quality metrics,
exporting structured data for VS Code extension IntelliSense, and
a lightweight schema validator for game-developer data validation.

functions.name: scan
functions.description: Scan the lurek.* namespace to build an API catalog from live bindings.

functions.name: scanModule
functions.description: Scan a single module's bindings.

functions.name: loadToml
functions.description: Load a TOML doc file into an ApiCatalog.

functions.name: loadAll
functions.description: Load all .toml files in a directory and merge into a single ApiCatalog.

functions.name: describe
functions.description: Inject or update a description for a named API entry.

functions.name: setParamInfo
functions.description: Set the parameter metadata for a catalog entry.

modules.name: ecs
modules.description:
`lurek.ecs` â€” Lightweight ECS with entity lifecycle, components, tags, layers, and blueprints.

Wraps [`crate::ecs::Universe`] as `LuaUniverse` userdata. Supports spawn/kill,
per-entity component CRUD, tag flags, named layers, queries, blueprints, and
component add/remove observer callbacks.

functions.name: newUniverse
functions.description: Creates a new empty ECS universe.

modules.name: effect
modules.description:
`lurek.effect` â€” Composable visual effects: post-processing pipeline and screen overlays.

Exposes `PostFxEffect` (individual shader passes), `PostFxStack` (ordered chains),
`ImageEffect` (named preset bundles), `Overlay` (screen-space weather/vignette),
and `ScreenTransition` (fade/wipe between scenes). Also provides render-to-texture
feedback loops for motion-trail effects.

functions.name: newEffect
functions.description: Creates a new built-in post-processing effect by type name.

functions.name: newCustomEffect
functions.description: Creates a custom shader post-processing effect.

functions.name: newStack
functions.description: Creates a new post-processing pipeline stack.

functions.name: newPresetStack
functions.description: Creates a pre-configured effect stack from a named preset.

functions.name: newPass
functions.description: Creates a custom-shader post-processing effect (alias for newCustomEffect).

functions.name: getEffectTypes
functions.description: Returns the list of all built-in effect type names.

functions.name: newImageEffect
functions.description: Creates a new per-image effect chain. Accepts:

functions.name: newOverlay
functions.description: Creates a new screen overlay controller for weather, flash, shake, and fade effects.

functions.name: newTransition
functions.description: Creates a new screen-transition controller. `kind` is one of:

functions.name: setShaderErrorDisplay
functions.description: Enables or disables the effect that renders shader compile errors as red text

functions.name: getShaderErrorDisplay
functions.description: Returns whether shader error display is currently enabled.

modules.name: engine
modules.description:
`lurek.runtime` â€” Runtime engine metadata and introspection.

Exposes read-only properties about the running engine: version, target
frame budget, memory usage, host platform, and total uptime.

functions.name: getVersion
functions.description: Returns the engine version string (from `Cargo.toml`).

functions.name: getFrameBudget
functions.description: Returns the target frame budget in milliseconds (default: 1000 / 60 â‰ 16.667 ms).

functions.name: memoryUsage
functions.description: Returns a table with `lua_bytes` (Lua GC heap usage in bytes) and

functions.name: platform
functions.description: Returns a string identifying the host operating system:

functions.name: uptime
functions.description: Returns the total engine uptime in seconds (sum of all processed deltas).

functions.name: fps
functions.description: Returns the current measured frames-per-second.

functions.name: frameCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of frames processed since engine start.

functions.name: isDebug
functions.description: Returns `true` if the engine was compiled in debug mode.

functions.name: setResourceBudget
functions.description: Sets the maximum resident texture memory budget in bytes.

functions.name: getResourceStats
functions.description: Returns a table with resident resource memory statistics.

modules.name: event
modules.description:
`lurek.signal` â€” Event queue polling and pub-sub signal dispatching.

Provides `Signal` userdata for named-event pub-sub with once-fire handles,
per-handle filter predicates, wildcard subscriptions, and integration with the
engine event bus for built-in events (resize, focus, quit, etc.).

functions.name: exit
functions.description: Pushes an exit event, requesting the engine to stop.

functions.name: poll
functions.description: Returns an iterator function that pops events from the queue.

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Discards all pending events in the queue.

functions.name: newSignal
functions.description: Creates a new pub-sub Signal dispatcher.

functions.name: pump
functions.description: Syncs OS-level events into the queue (no-op in Lurek2D push model).

functions.name: wait
functions.description: Blocks until the next event arrives or the optional timeout elapses.

functions.name: restart
functions.description: Requests that the engine restart at the beginning of the next frame.

functions.name: quit
functions.description: Alias for `exit()` â€” requests the engine to stop at the end of the current frame.

functions.name: pushDeferred
functions.description: Pushes a named event to the deferred buffer; it will not reach the main queue

functions.name: flushDeferred
functions.description: Moves all buffered deferred events into the main event queue and clears the buffer.

functions.name: enableHistory
functions.description: Enables event history recording, keeping the last `capacity` pushed events.

functions.name: getHistory
functions.description: Returns an array of recent events as `{name, args}` tables.

functions.name: clearHistory
functions.description: Clears all recorded event history.

functions.name: push
functions.description: Adds an event item to the end of the event queue for processing.

modules.name: filesystem

`lurek.filesystem` â€” Sandboxed file I/O, directory queries, and async asset loading.

All paths are resolved through the game's [`GameFS`] sandbox. Supports file
read/write via `FileHandle`, bulk-data via `FileData`, ZIP archive mounting,
directory listing, path manipulation, and per-file change watching.

functions.description: Polls all watched paths and returns an array of paths that changed since the

functions.name: mkdir

functions.description: Resolves a path relative to the game root to an absolute OS path string.

modules.name: globe
modules.description:
`lurek.globe` — XCOM-style Geoscape province sphere API.

Thin Lua wrapper. All `mlua` imports and `impl LuaUserData` live here.
Domain logic lives in `crate::globe::*`.

functions.description: Convert lat/lon (degrees) to a unit-sphere Cartesian vector {x, y, z}.

modules.name: graph
modules.description:
`lurek.graph` â€” Directed graph with item-flow simulation.

Provides a node/edge graph model with typed item transport, overflow policies,
conversion rules, demand/supply links, and event callbacks (`itemEnter`,
`itemLeave`, etc.). Also exposes graph-level pathfinding (Dijkstra, BFS, A*)
through the `find*` methods on the `Graph` userdata.

functions.name: newGraph
functions.description: Creates a new empty directed graph for item flow simulation.

modules.name: html
modules.description:
`lurek.html` — Lightweight pure-Rust HTML/CSS layout engine Lua bindings.

Thin Lua wrapper for `crate::html`. Exposes `HtmlDocument` and `HtmlElement`
as userdata and registers `lurek.html.newDocument`, `lurek.html.loadDocument`,
and `lurek.html.supports` as module-level constructors.

functions.description: Prevents the default browser action associated with this event.

functions.name: stopPropagation
functions.description: Stops the event from bubbling up to parent elements.

functions.name: isDefaultPrevented

functions.description: Creates a detached HTML document from markup and optional CSS/viewport options.

functions.name: loadDocument
functions.description: Placeholder for future sandboxed document loading.

functions.name: supports
functions.description: Returns whether the active HTML facade supports a named feature.

modules.name: i18n
modules.description:
Registers the `lurek.i18n.*` internationalization and i18n API.

Thin Lua bridge that delegates to the [`i18n`][crate::i18n] domain module.
All translation tables, fallback logic, interpolation, and pluralization live
in [`crate::i18n`]; this file converts between Lua values and domain types.

functions.name: unloadTable

modules.name: image
modules.description:
`lurek.image` â€” CPU-side pixel-level image manipulation.

Exposes `ImageData` (RGBA pixel buffers), `CompressedImageData` (DXT/BC/ETC),
`LayeredImage` (multi-layer compositing), `ProvinceGrid` (colour-keyed region maps),
and `PaletteLUT` (palette-swap look-up tables). All operations run on the CPU;
upload to GPU is handled by the render layer.

functions.name: loadLayered

functions.name: newPaletteLut
functions.description: Creates a new empty `PaletteLUT` used to remap colours in an image.

modules.name: input

modules.name: light
modules.description:
`lurek.light` â€” 2D lighting, shadow occluders, and ambient control.

Manages `Light` handles (point / directional / spot) and `Occluder` handles
(line-segment shadow casters) within the engine's `LightWorld`. Supports
attenuation, blend modes, falloff curves, shadow filtering, flicker configs,
cookie textures, colour transitions, and ambient colour control.

functions.name: newLight
functions.description: Creates a new light at (x, y) with the given radius and optional settings.

functions.name: newOccluder
functions.description: Creates a new shadow occluder from a vertex table and optional settings.

functions.description: Sets the global ambient light color.

functions.name: isEnabled
functions.description: Returns whether the lighting system is active.

functions.name: getLightCount
functions.description: Returns the number of lights in the world.

functions.name: getOccluderCount
functions.description: Returns the number of occluders in the world.

functions.name: getMaxLights
functions.description: Returns the maximum number of lights processed per frame.

functions.name: setMaxLights
functions.description: Sets the maximum number of lights processed per frame (clamped 1â€“256).

functions.name: setGroupColor
functions.description: Sets the color for all lights in the given group.

functions.name: getGroupCount
functions.description: Returns the number of lights in the given group.

functions.name: advanceFlickers
functions.description: Advances flicker phase for all lights with flicker enabled.

functions.name: syncAmbient

functions.name: getGodRayHints
functions.description: Returns a list of directional light hints for god-ray rendering.

modules.name: log
modules.description:
Structured game-level logging API (`lurek.log.*`).

Exposes convenience logging functions so Lua scripts can emit messages at
specific severity levels and query or change the active log level at
runtime. Also supports configurable output sinks (file, memory ring buffer)
in addition to the default stderr channel, similar to Python's `logging`
module handlers.

functions.name: debug
functions.description: Emits a debug-severity log message. Also dispatches to configured sinks.

functions.name: info
functions.description: Emits an info-severity log message. Also dispatches to configured sinks.

functions.name: warn
functions.description: Emits a warn-severity log message. Also dispatches to configured sinks.

functions.name: error
functions.description: Emits an error-severity log message. Also dispatches to configured sinks.

functions.name: print
functions.description: Emits a log message at the specified level. Also dispatches to sinks.

functions.name: setLevel
functions.description: Sets the minimum severity level for the default log channel.

functions.name: getLevel
functions.description: Returns the name of the currently active minimum log level.

functions.name: addSink
functions.description: Registers a new output sink. Returns its numeric id.

functions.name: removeSink
functions.description: Removes a sink by id. Returns true if one was removed.

functions.name: clearSinks
functions.description: Removes all registered sinks (the default stderr channel is unaffected).

functions.name: listSinks
functions.description: Returns a table describing all registered sinks.

functions.name: readMemory
functions.description: Reads entries from a memory sink. If drain=true the buffer is cleared.

functions.name: flushFile
functions.description: Flushes the OS write buffer for a file sink.

functions.name: struct
functions.description: Emits a structured log message with key-value fields.

functions.name: debug_fields
functions.description: Emits a debug structured log message. Shorthand for `struct("debug", ...)`.

functions.name: info_fields
functions.description: Emits an info structured log message. Shorthand for `struct("info", ...)`.

functions.name: warn_fields
functions.description: Emits a warn structured log message. Shorthand for `struct("warn", ...)`.

functions.name: error_fields
functions.description: Emits an error structured log message. Shorthand for `struct("error", ...)`.

modules.name: math
modules.description:
`lurek.math` — Math utilities: random generators, transforms, Bezier curves, tweening,
spatial hashing, noise, easing, polygon triangulation, and color-space conversion.

functions.name: newRandomGenerator
functions.description: Creates a new random number generator with an optional seed.

functions.name: newTransform
functions.description: Creates a new Transform, optionally initialised from full parameters.

functions.name: newBezierCurve
functions.description: Creates a new BezierCurve from a flat table of coordinates {x1,y1, x2,y2, ...}.

functions.name: newTween
functions.description: Creates a new Tween with the given duration and easing name.

functions.name: newSpatialHash
functions.description: Creates a new SpatialHash with the given cell size.

functions.name: newNoiseGenerator
functions.description: Creates a new seeded noise generator.

functions.name: perlin2d
functions.description: Returns 2D Perlin noise at (x, y) with the given seed.

functions.name: perlin3d
functions.description: Returns 3D Perlin noise at (x, y, z) with the given seed.

functions.name: simplex2d
functions.description: Returns 2D Simplex noise at (x, y) with the given seed.

functions.name: fbm
functions.description: Returns fractal Brownian motion noise at (x, y).

functions.name: applyEasing
functions.description: Applies a named easing function to progress value t.

functions.name: linear
functions.description: Linear easing (identity).

functions.name: inQuad
functions.description: Quadratic ease-in — acceleration that starts at zero and increases.

functions.name: outQuad
functions.description: Quadratic ease-out — deceleration that starts fast and ends at zero.

functions.name: inOutQuad
functions.description: Quadratic ease-in-out — slow start, fast middle, slow end.

functions.name: inCubic
functions.description: Cubic ease-in — acceleration starts slowly then increases sharply.

functions.name: outCubic
functions.description: Cubic ease-out — rapid deceleration using a cubic power curve.

functions.name: inOutCubic
functions.description: Cubic ease-in-out — slow start and end with fast cubic middle.

functions.name: inQuart
functions.description: Quartic ease-in — strongly delayed acceleration using a power-of-4 curve.

functions.name: outQuart
functions.description: Quartic ease-out — rapid deceleration using a power-of-4 curve.

functions.name: inOutQuart
functions.description: Quartic ease-in-out — very slow start and end with a sharp middle peak.

functions.name: inSine
functions.description: Sinusoidal ease-in — gentle acceleration based on a sine curve.

functions.name: outSine
functions.description: Sinusoidal ease-out — gentle deceleration based on a cosine curve.

functions.name: inOutSine
functions.description: Sinusoidal ease-in-out — smooth S-curve based on cosine interpolation.

functions.name: inExpo
functions.description: Exponential ease-in — very slow start that accelerates sharply near the end.

functions.name: outExpo
functions.description: Exponential ease-out — sharp initial speed that decelerates exponentially.

functions.name: inOutExpo
functions.description: Exponential ease-in-out — very slow start and end with an exponential surge.

functions.name: inElastic
functions.description: Elastic ease-in — spring-like overshoot at the beginning of the motion.

functions.name: outElastic
functions.description: Elastic ease-out — spring-like oscillation that settles at the target.

functions.name: outBounce
functions.description: Bounce ease-out — simulates a ball bouncing against the target value.

functions.name: inBounce
functions.description: Bounce ease-in — reverse bounce effect that accelerates into the motion.

functions.name: inBack
functions.description: Back ease-in — overshoots slightly before settling at the target.

functions.name: outBack
functions.description: Back ease-out — overshoots the target then snaps back into place.

functions.name: inOutElastic
functions.description: Elastic ease-in-out — spring-like oscillation on both ends.

functions.name: inOutBounce
functions.description: Bounce ease-in-out — bouncing motion on both ends.

functions.name: inOutBack
functions.description: Back ease-in-out — overshoot on both ends.

functions.name: triangulate
functions.description: Triangulates a simple polygon given as a flat table {x1,y1, x2,y2, ...}.

functions.name: isConvex
functions.description: Returns true if the polygon (flat table {x1,y1,...}) is convex.

functions.name: gammaToLinear
functions.description: Converts a gamma-encoded sRGB value to linear space.

functions.name: linearToGamma
functions.description: Converts a linear-space value to gamma-encoded sRGB.

functions.name: angleBetween
functions.description: Returns the angle in radians from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2).

functions.name: circleContainsPoint
functions.description: Returns true if the point (px, py) lies inside the circle.

functions.name: circleIntersectsCircle
functions.description: Returns true if two circles overlap.

functions.name: circleIntersectsLine
functions.signature: (cx, cy, r, lx1, ly1, lx2, ly2)
functions.description: Tests an infinite line against a circle. Returns hit, then two optional hit-point pairs.

functions.name: circleIntersectsSegment
functions.signature: (cx, cy, r, sx1, sy1, sx2, sy2)
functions.description: Tests a line segment against a circle. Returns hit, then two optional hit-point pairs.

functions.name: closestPointOnSegment
functions.description: Returns the closest point on segment (x1,y1)-(x2,y2) to point (px,py).

functions.name: convexHull
functions.description: Computes the convex hull of a flat {x1,y1,...} point list. Returns a flat table.

functions.name: delaunayTriangulate
functions.description: Delaunay triangulation of a flat {x1,y1,...} point list. Returns a table of flat 6-number triangle tables.

functions.name: lineIntersect
functions.description: Infinite line intersection. Returns (x, y) or (nil, nil) if lines are parallel.

functions.name: pointInPolygon
functions.description: Returns true if (px, py) is inside the polygon given as a flat {x1,y1,...} table.

functions.name: polygonArea
functions.description: Returns the signed area of a polygon given as a flat {x1,y1,...} table.

functions.name: polygonCentroid
functions.description: Returns the centroid (cx, cy) of a polygon given as a flat {x1,y1,...} table.

functions.name: segmentIntersectsSegment
functions.description: Tests if two line segments intersect. Returns (hit, ix?, iy?).

functions.name: bresenham
functions.description: Rasterizes a line from (x1,y1) to (x2,y2) using Bresenham's algorithm. Returns a table of {x,y} tables.

functions.name: rad
functions.description: Converts degrees to radians.

functions.name: deg
functions.description: Converts radians to degrees.

functions.name: sin
functions.description: Returns the sine of x (radians).

functions.name: cos
functions.description: Returns the cosine of x (radians).

functions.name: tan
functions.description: Returns the tangent of x (radians).

functions.name: asin
functions.description: Returns the arcsine of x, in radians.

functions.name: acos
functions.description: Returns the arccosine of x, in radians.

functions.name: atan
functions.description: Returns the arctangent of x (or atan2(y, x) when two args given).

functions.name: atan2
functions.description: Returns atan(y/x) using the signs of both args to determine the quadrant.

functions.name: sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of x.

functions.name: abs
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of x.

functions.name: floor
functions.description: Returns the largest integer ≤ x.

functions.name: ceil
functions.description: Returns the smallest integer ≥ x.

functions.name: round
functions.description: Returns x rounded to the nearest integer (half-up).

functions.name: exp
functions.description: Returns e raised to the power x.

functions.name: log
functions.description: Returns the natural log of x, or log base b if b is supplied.

functions.name: pow
functions.description: Returns x raised to the power y.

functions.name: min
functions.description: Returns the smallest of the supplied numbers.

functions.name: max
functions.description: Returns the largest of the supplied numbers.

functions.name: fmod
functions.description: Returns the remainder of x / y (fmod).

functions.name: distance
functions.description: Returns the Euclidean distance between (x1,y1) and (x2,y2).

functions.name: distanceSq
functions.description: Returns the squared Euclidean distance between (x1,y1) and (x2,y2) (avoids sqrt).

functions.name: random
functions.description: Returns a pseudo-random number in [0,1) with no args,

functions.name: randomInt
functions.description: Returns a pseudo-random integer in [lo, hi] (inclusive).

functions.name: simplexNoise
functions.description: Returns a simplex noise value in [-1, 1] for 2D or 3D coordinates.

functions.name: vec2
functions.description: Creates a 2D vector with x and y components.

functions.name: Vec2
functions.description: Compatibility alias for `vec2`.

functions.name: vec3
functions.description: Creates a 3D vector `{x, y, z}` table with numeric components.

functions.name: Vec3
functions.description: Compatibility alias for `vec3`.

functions.name: catmullRom
functions.description: Creates a Catmull-Rom spline through the given control points.

functions.name: hermite
functions.signature: (p0x, p0y, p1x, p1y, m0x, m0y, m1x, m1y)
functions.description: Creates a Hermite spline defined by two endpoints and tangents.

functions.name: lerp
functions.description: Linear interpolation between two numbers: a + (b - a) * t.

functions.name: remap
functions.description: Remaps `v` from [in_min, in_max] to [out_min, out_max].

functions.name: clamp
functions.description: Clamps `v` between `min` and `max`.

functions.name: sign
functions.description: Returns -1, 0, or 1 depending on the sign of `v`.

functions.name: smoothstep
functions.description: Hermite smoothstep between `edge0` and `edge1`.

functions.name: inverseLerp
functions.description: Returns the interpolation parameter t for `v` in [a, b].

functions.name: hslToRgb
functions.description: Converts HSL (h: 0-360, s: 0-1, l: 0-1) to RGBA (r, g, b, a) floats.

functions.name: fromHex
functions.description: Parses a hex color string (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) into (r, g, b, a) floats.

functions.name: rgbToHsl
functions.description: Converts RGBA floats to HSL (h: 0-360, s: 0-1, l: 0-1).

functions.name: rectUnion
functions.description: Returns the union (bounding box) of two rectangles.

functions.name: rectFromCenter
functions.description: Creates a rectangle centered at (cx, cy) with the given width and height.

functions.name: polygonClip
functions.description: Clips a polygon against a single half-plane using the Sutherland-Hodgman algorithm.

functions.name: aabbTree
functions.description: Creates a new empty AABB tree for efficient broad-phase overlap queries.

functions.name: newCircle
functions.description: Creates a new Circle value type with the given centre and radius.

functions.name: polygonIntersection
functions.description: Computes the intersection of two convex polygons using the Sutherland-Hodgman

functions.name: polygonUnion
functions.description: Computes the approximate union of two convex polygons as the convex hull of

functions.name: polygonDifference
functions.description: Computes the approximate difference `A - B` (the part of A not covered by B).

functions.name: voronoi
functions.description: Computes the Voronoi diagram for a list of 2-D seed points.

modules.name: minimap
modules.description: `lurek.minimap` â€” Grid-based minimap with terrain, fog of war, objects, pings, and markers.

functions.name: newMinimap
functions.description: Creates a new grid-based minimap.

modules.name: mods
modules.description: `lurek.mods` - Mod discovery, dependency resolution, load ordering, and hot-reload.

functions.name: newMod
functions.description: Creates a new Mod from an info table with at least an `id` field.

functions.name: newModManager
functions.description: Creates a new empty ModManager.

functions.name: newRegistry
functions.description: Creates a new empty ContentRegistry for mod-contributed assets.

functions.name: checkApiVersion
functions.description: Checks whether a mod's required `api_version` is compatible with the given `host_version`.

modules.name: network
modules.description:
`lurek.network` — Full networking toolkit for multiplayer games.

Provides ENet UDP, HTTP, TCP, WebSocket, and MessagePack serialization
through the `lurek.network` Lua namespace.

functions.name: newHost
functions.description: Creates a new network host bound to the given address.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.type: table — { addr?, maxPeers?, peers?, channels?, inBandwidth?, outBandwidth? }

functions.name: newServer
functions.description: Creates a server host that binds to a port and accepts connections.

functions.name: newClient
functions.description: Creates a client host that connects to a remote server.

functions.name: newRuntime
functions.description: Creates a background network runtime for async HTTP, TCP, and WebSocket.

functions.name: pack
functions.description: Serializes a Lua value to a binary MessagePack string.

functions.name: unpack
functions.description: Deserializes a MessagePack binary string back to a Lua value.

functions.name: createLobby
functions.description: Creates a LobbyInfo record and broadcasts it once on the local network.

functions.name: discoverLobbies
functions.description: Listens for LAN lobby announcements for `timeout_ms` milliseconds (default 500).

functions.name: syncEntity
functions.description: Convenience helper: packs an entity snapshot and broadcasts it to all peers.

modules.name: parallax
modules.description:
`lurek.parallax` â€” multi-layer scrolling background system.

Registers `lurek.parallax.newLayer(opts)` and `lurek.parallax.newSet(name)`.
Domain logic lives in `src/parallax/`; this file is the thin Lua bridge only.

functions.name: newLayer
functions.description: Creates a new parallax background layer from an options table.

functions.name: newSet
functions.description: Creates a new empty parallax set with the given name.

modules.name: particle
modules.description: `lurek.particle` â€” Emitter-based 2D particle systems and trail ribbons.

functions.name: newSystem
functions.description: Creates a new particle system and stores it in the engine pool.

functions.name: newTrail
functions.description: Creates a new trail ribbon effect.

functions.name: fromTOML
functions.description: Creates a new particle system from a TOML config file.

modules.name: pathfind
modules.description: `lurek.pathfind` — Grid-based A★, HPA★, flow field, and unit-aware navigation.

functions.name: newNavGrid
functions.description: Creates a new NavGrid with all cells walkable.

functions.name: newPathfinder
functions.description: Creates a new UnitPathfinder backed by a NavGrid.

functions.name: newFlowField
functions.description: Creates a new FlowField backed by a NavGrid.

functions.name: newPathGrid
functions.description: Creates a new PathGrid with per-cell cost and walkability.

functions.name: newPathFlowField
functions.description: Creates a new BFS flow field from a PathGrid.

functions.name: setThreadCount
functions.description: Sets the background pathfinding thread count (currently a no-op).

functions.name: getThreadCount
functions.description: Returns the background pathfinding thread count (currently always 0).

functions.name: newNavGridFromTileMap
functions.description: Builds a NavGrid from a TileMap layer, treating specified GIDs as blocked (unwalkable).

functions.name: newHexGrid
functions.description: Creates a hex grid for pathfinding, LOS, FOV, and range queries.

functions.name: newJpsGrid
functions.description: Creates a uniform-cost grid optimised for Jump Point Search (orthogonal + diagonal).

functions.name: rangeMap
functions.description: Computes a Dijkstra range-of-movement map from an origin within a movement budget.

modules.name: patterns
modules.description:
Registers the `lurek.patterns.*` software design patterns API.

Provides factory functions and UserData wrappers for reusable patterns:
EventBus (prioritized pub-sub), ObjectPool (object reuse), CommandStack
(undo/redo), ServiceLocator (DI container), Factory (named constructors),
and SimpleState (finite state machine).

functions.name: newEventBus
functions.description: Creates a new EventBus instance.

functions.name: newObjectPool
functions.description: Creates a new ObjectPool instance.

functions.name: newCommandStack
functions.description: Creates a new CommandStack instance.

functions.name: newServiceLocator
functions.description: Creates a new ServiceLocator instance.

functions.name: newFactory
functions.description: Creates a new Factory instance.

functions.name: newSimpleState
functions.description: Creates a new SimpleState finite state machine instance.

functions.name: newBlackboard
functions.description: Creates a new Blackboard shared key-value store.

functions.name: newObserver
functions.description: Creates a new reactive property Observer.

functions.name: newThrottle
functions.description: Creates a leading-edge rate limiter that fires at most once per interval seconds.

functions.name: newDebounce
functions.description: Creates a trailing-edge debounce that fires after the input stream is idle for wait seconds.

functions.name: newPriorityQueue
functions.description: Creates a stable priority-ordered task queue.

functions.name: newRing
functions.description: Creates a fixed-capacity circular history buffer.

functions.name: newFunnel
functions.description: Creates a time-windowed event aggregator. window=0 means flush on every push.

functions.name: newRelationshipManager
functions.description: Creates a new entity relationship manager.

functions.name: newMediator
functions.description: Creates a new named-channel message broker.

functions.name: newStrategy
functions.description: Creates a new strategy registry.

functions.name: newStack
functions.description: Creates a LIFO stack. capacity=0 means unlimited.

functions.name: newQueue
functions.description: Creates a FIFO queue. capacity=0 means unlimited.

functions.name: newList
functions.description: Creates an ordered, resizable list.

functions.name: newSet
functions.description: Creates an unordered set that rejects duplicate values (by string key).

functions.name: destroyWorld
functions.description: Marks a physics world for destruction. Subsequent operations on the world

functions.name: newChainShape

functions.name: attachShape
functions.description: Attaches a standalone shape to a body as an additional fixture.

functions.name: getCollisions

functions.name: debugDraw

functions.name: drawDebugGpu

functions.name: newCellular

modules.name: tween
modules.description:
`lurek.tween` â€” thin Lua registration wrapper for the property tween system.

# Purpose

This file is a **registration-only** wrapper following the Thin Wrapper Rule:
it contains `pub fn register()` and the closure bodies that delegate immediately
to domain types in `src/tween/`. All business logic, structs, and state machines
live in `src/tween/handle.rs` (`LuaTween`, `LuaTweenSequence`, `LuaTweenParallel`)
and `src/tween/engine.rs` (`TweenEngine`).

# Architecture

`TweenEngine` is a module-local `Rc<RefCell<â€¦>>` that tracks all active handle
objects via `LuaRegistryKey` references. Lua scripts hold UserData handles and
keep them alive for the duration of the animation. The engine never ticks tweens
automatically â€” the script must call `lurek.tween.update(dt)` from `lurek.process`.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Advances all active tweens, sequences, and parallels by `dt` seconds.

functions.name: tween
functions.description: Creates a new property tween and registers it for automatic updating.

functions.name: sequence
functions.description: Creates an empty TweenSequence. Add steps with :tween(), :delay(), :callback(),

functions.name: parallel
functions.description: Creates an empty TweenParallel. Add entries with :tween() or :add(tween),

functions.name: delay
functions.description: Creates a no-op tween that waits `seconds`, then optionally calls `callback`.

functions.name: cancelAll
functions.description: Cancels all active tweens, sequences, parallels, and springs immediately.

methods.name: getModules
methods.description: Returns a sorted list of module names present in the catalog.

methods.name: getEntries
methods.description: Returns all entries, optionally filtered to a single module.

methods.name: getEntry
methods.description: Returns a single entry by qualified name, or nil.

methods.name: getTypes
methods.description: Returns the names of all entries with kind "type" in the given module.

methods.name: getTypeMethods
methods.description: Returns entries that are methods of the given type qualified name.

methods.name: entryCount
methods.description: Returns the number of entries, optionally scoped to a module.

methods.name: merge
methods.description: Returns a new catalog that is the union of this and another catalog, with other overriding duplicates.

methods.name: filter
methods.description: Returns a new catalog containing only entries for which predicate returns true.

methods.name: search
methods.description: Returns a table of entries whose name, qualified name, or description contains query.

methods.name: toTable
methods.description: Converts the catalog to a plain Lua table array.

methods.name: toJSON
methods.description: Serialises the catalog to a pretty-printed JSON string.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns true if this object is of the given type.

methods.description: Sets the element at the given 1-based indices to a value.

methods.description: Returns the transposed 2D array.

methods.description: Fills all elements with the given value in-place.

methods.name: pow
methods.description: Raises each element to a scalar exponent.

methods.name: sqrt
methods.description: Element-wise square root.

methods.description: Element-wise absolute value.

methods.name: neg
methods.description: Returns a new Array with every element negated (multiplied by â’1).

methods.description: Clamps each element to the given range.

methods.description: Returns true if all elements are nonzero.

methods.name: sum

methods.name: min
methods.description: Minimum of all elements, or along an axis (1-based).

methods.name: max
methods.description: Maximum of all elements, or along an axis (1-based).

methods.description: Cumulative sum of all elements (flattened).

methods.description: Discrete difference applied `order` times.

methods.description: Compute a histogram. Returns a table of {lo, hi, count} tables.

methods.description: Compute the p-th percentile (0â€“100).

methods.description: Pearson correlation coefficient with another 1D array.

methods.description: 1D cross-correlation with a template array (valid output).

methods.description: L2-normalise a 1D vector.

methods.description: Outer product of two 1D vectors â†’ 2D array [m, n].

methods.name: cross2d
methods.description: Signed 2D cross product with another length-2 array.

methods.name: transformPoints
methods.description: Apply this 2Ă—2 or 3Ă—3 matrix to an [N,2] points array.

methods.name: sobel
methods.description: Apply Sobel edge detection to a 2D array. Returns {gx=Array, gy=Array}.

methods.name: linsolve
methods.description: Solve AÂ·x = b where this array is A (square [n,n]) and b is a 1D vector.

methods.name: luDecompose
methods.description: Decomposes this square matrix into L and U factors with partial pivoting.

methods.name: eigenPower
methods.description: Computes the dominant eigenvalue and its eigenvector using power iteration.

methods.name: map
methods.description: Apply a Lua callback element-wise, returning a new Array of the same shape.

parameters.name: fn
parameters.type: function(value: number) → number — called for each element

methods.returns: Array — new array with transformed values
methods.returnType: Array — new array with transformed values

methods.description: Evaluate a Lua expression string element-wise, returning a new Array.

parameters.name: expr
parameters.type: string — Lua expression using `x` as the input variable

methods.returns: Array — new array with transformed values
methods.returnType: Array — new array with transformed values

methods.description: Fold the array left-to-right with an accumulator.

parameters.name: fn
parameters.type: function(acc: number, value: number) → number — accumulator function

methods.description: Running accumulation — like reduce but returns every intermediate result.

parameters.name: fn
parameters.type: function(acc: number, value: number) → number — accumulator function

methods.returns: Array — array of cumulative values (same length as input)
methods.returnType: Array — array of cumulative values (same length as input)

classes.name: LImageData
classes.description: RGBA pixel buffer for software image manipulation, pixel access, and encoding.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the width of the image in pixels.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the height of the image in pixels.

methods.name: getDimensions
methods.description: Returns the width and height of the image as two integers.

methods.name: getPixel
methods.description: Returns the RGBA colour components of the pixel at (x, y) as four integers (0-255).

methods.name: setPixel
methods.description: Sets the RGBA colour of the pixel at (x, y); returns an error if coordinates are out of bounds.

methods.name: encode
methods.description: Encodes the image into a byte string in the specified format (currently "png").

methods.name: getString
methods.description: Returns the raw pixel bytes of the image as a Lua string.

methods.name: mapPixel
methods.description: Calls func(x, y, r, g, b, a) for each pixel and writes the returned RGBA back.

methods.name: brightness
methods.description: Adjusts the brightness of every pixel by the given factor (< 1.0 darkens, > 1.0 brightens).

methods.name: contrast
methods.description: Adjusts the contrast of every pixel by the given factor (< 1.0 reduces, > 1.0 increases).

methods.name: saturation
methods.description: Adjusts colour saturation; 0.0 produces grayscale, 1.0 is unchanged, > 1.0 boosts saturation.

methods.name: gamma
methods.description: Applies gamma correction; values < 1.0 brighten shadows, > 1.0 darken them.

methods.name: tint
methods.description: Blends an RGB tint colour into every pixel, controlled by factor (0.0 = no change, 1.0 = full tint).

methods.name: grayscale
methods.description: Converts the image to grayscale using luminance weights (BT.601).

methods.name: sepia
methods.description: Applies a warm sepia tone to the image using standard sepia matrix weights.

methods.name: invert
methods.description: Inverts every colour channel (subtracts each R/G/B value from 255); alpha is preserved.

methods.name: threshold
methods.description: Converts the image to black-and-white: pixels above value become white, at or below become black.

methods.name: posterize
methods.description: Reduces each channel to `levels` discrete steps, creating a flat poster-paint look.

methods.name: fill
methods.description: Fills every pixel with the given solid RGBA colour, overwriting all existing content.

methods.name: noise
methods.description: Adds random noise to every pixel channel; amount controls the maximum per-channel perturbation.

methods.name: alphaMask
methods.description: Scales every pixel's alpha channel by factor; use to fade an image in or out uniformly.

methods.name: flipHorizontal
methods.description: Flips the image left-to-right (mirror across vertical axis), modifying in place.

methods.name: flipVertical
methods.description: Flips the image top-to-bottom (mirror across horizontal axis), modifying in place.

methods.name: rotate90cw
methods.description: Returns a new ImageData rotated 90 degrees clockwise; the original is not modified.

methods.name: crop
methods.description: Returns a new ImageData containing the rectangular sub-region at (x, y) of the given width and height.

methods.name: resizeNearest
methods.description: Returns a new ImageData scaled to (new_w, new_h) using nearest-neighbour interpolation.

methods.name: blur
methods.description: Returns a new ImageData with a box blur applied using the given pixel radius.

methods.name: sharpen
methods.description: Returns a new ImageData with a sharpening convolution kernel applied.

methods.name: drawRect
methods.signature: (x, y, w, h, r, g, b, a)
methods.description: Draws a filled rectangle onto the image.

methods.name: drawCircle
methods.signature: (cx, cy, radius, r, g, b, a)
methods.description: Draws a filled circle onto the image.

methods.name: drawLine
methods.description: Draws a line using Bresenham's algorithm.

methods.name: resize
methods.description: Returns a bilinear-interpolated copy of the image at the given dimensions.

methods.name: blit
methods.description: Blits the source ImageData onto this image at (dst_x, dst_y) using Porter-Duff over.

methods.name: getRegion
methods.description: Returns a copy of the rectangular sub-region as a new ImageData.

methods.name: diff
methods.description: Returns the sum of absolute per-channel pixel differences with another ImageData.

methods.name: mapPixels
methods.description: Applies a function to every pixel in-place.

methods.name: convolve
methods.description: Applies a custom NxN convolution kernel to the image and returns a new ImageData.

methods.name: applyPaletteLut
methods.description: Applies a `PaletteLUT` to the image in place, replacing exact colour matches.

methods.name: setRawData
methods.description: Replaces all pixel data from a raw RGBA byte string.

methods.name: paste
methods.description: Copies pixels from `source` onto this image starting at (dx, dy).

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns true if this object is of the given type name.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the pixel width of this image buffer.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the pixel height of this image buffer.

methods.name: resize
methods.description: Returns a new ImageData scaled to the given dimensions using bilinear interpolation.

methods.name: blit
methods.description: Blits the source ImageData onto this image at (dst_x, dst_y) using Porter-Duff `over`.

methods.name: getRegion
methods.description: Returns a copy of the rectangular sub-region as a new ImageData.

methods.name: diff
methods.description: Returns the sum of absolute per-channel differences between this image and `other`.

methods.name: mapPixels
methods.description: Applies a Lua function to every pixel in-place.

methods.description: Returns the type name "ImageData".

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns true when the given name matches "ImageData" or a parent type.

classes.name: LWorld
classes.description: Lua-side handle wrapping a physics World.

methods.name: drawDebug
methods.description: Draws physics objects for debugging

methods.name: step
methods.description: Advances the physics simulation by dt seconds, firing onBeginContact /

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Resets the world, removing all bodies and joints.

methods.name: getGravity
methods.description: Returns the gravity vector (gx, gy).

methods.name: setGravity
methods.description: Sets the world gravity vector; default is `(0, 9.81)` (downward).

methods.name: setMeter

methods.description: Returns the pixels-per-meter scaling factor.

methods.description: Converts a pixel value to physics units.

methods.name: toPixels

methods.name: getBodyCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of bodies in the world.

methods.name: getBodyIds
methods.description: Returns all body IDs in the world.

methods.name: destroyBody
methods.description: Removes a body from the world.

methods.name: newBody
methods.description: Creates a new rectangular body and adds it to the world.

methods.name: newCircleBody
methods.description: Creates a new circular body and adds it to the world.

methods.name: newPolygonBody
methods.description: Creates a new polygon body from a flat vertex table and adds it to the world.

methods.name: newEdgeBody
methods.signature: (x, y, x1, y1, x2, y2, bt)
methods.description: Creates a new edge (line segment) body and adds it to the world.

methods.name: newChainBody
methods.description: Creates a new chain body from a flat vertex table and adds it to the world.

methods.name: addFixture

methods.name: fixtureCount
methods.description: Returns the number of fixtures on a body.

methods.name: setFixtureFriction
methods.description: Sets friction on a fixture by index.

methods.name: setFixtureRestitution
methods.description: Sets restitution on a fixture by index.

methods.name: setFixtureSensor
methods.description: Sets whether a fixture is a sensor.

methods.name: addRevoluteJoint
methods.description: Creates a revolute (pin) joint between two bodies.

methods.name: addDistanceJoint
methods.signature: (a, b, ax1, ay1, ax2, ay2, len)
methods.description: Creates a distance joint between two bodies.

methods.name: addPrismaticJoint
methods.description: Creates a prismatic (slider) joint between two bodies.

methods.name: addWeldJoint
methods.description: Creates a weld (rigid) joint between two bodies.

methods.name: addRopeJoint
methods.signature: (a, b, ax1, ay1, ax2, ay2, max)
methods.description: Creates a rope joint with a maximum distance.

methods.name: addWheelJoint
methods.description: Creates a wheel joint (prismatic + rotation).

methods.name: addFrictionJoint
methods.description: Creates a friction joint that resists relative motion.

methods.name: addMotorJoint
methods.description: Creates a motor joint that drives body_b toward body_a.

methods.name: addMouseJoint
methods.description: Creates a mouse joint connecting a body to a target point.

methods.name: addPulleyJoint
methods.description: Creates a pulley joint (stub — falls back to weld joint).

methods.name: addGearJoint
methods.description: Creates a gear joint (stub — falls back to weld joint).

methods.description: Registers a Lua function called with (bodyIdA, bodyIdB) when two

methods.name: clearBeginContact

methods.name: setEndContact
methods.description: Registers a Lua function called with (bodyIdA, bodyIdB) when two

methods.name: clearEndContact

methods.name: setBodyData

methods.name: getBodyCCD
methods.description: Returns whether CCD is enabled for a body.

methods.name: setBodyOneWay
methods.description: Marks a body as a one-way platform.  Bodies approaching from the

methods.name: clearBodyOneWay
methods.description: Removes the one-way platform flag from a body.

methods.description: Returns the one-way normal for a body, or nil if not configured.

methods.description: Returns the zone's integer ID.

methods.description: Enables or disables the zone.

methods.description: Sets the zone priority; higher values win over lower when zones overlap.

methods.description: Suppresses gravity inside the zone (zero-g pocket).

methods.name: setLinearDampingOverride
methods.description: Sets an optional linear damping override for bodies inside the zone.

methods.name: setAngularDampingOverride
methods.description: Sets an optional angular damping override for bodies inside the zone.

methods.description: Removes the zone from the world.

callbacks.name: load
callbacks.description: Called once after the game script is loaded.

callbacks.name: update
callbacks.description: Called every frame. `dt` is elapsed seconds.

callbacks.name: draw
callbacks.description: Called every frame for rendering. All draw calls must happen here.

callbacks.name: keypressed
callbacks.description: Called when a keyboard key is pressed.

callbacks.name: keyreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a keyboard key is released.

callbacks.name: textinput
callbacks.description: Called when text input is received.

callbacks.name: mousepressed
callbacks.description: Called when a mouse button is pressed.

callbacks.name: mousereleased
callbacks.description: Called when a mouse button is released.

callbacks.name: mousemoved
callbacks.description: Called when the mouse cursor moves.

callbacks.name: wheelmoved
callbacks.description: Called on mouse wheel scroll.

callbacks.name: gamepadpressed
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad button is pressed.

callbacks.name: gamepadreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad button is released.

callbacks.name: gamepadaxis
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad axis changes.

callbacks.name: joystickadded
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad is connected.

callbacks.name: joystickremoved
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad is disconnected.

callbacks.name: focus
callbacks.description: Called when window gains or loses focus.

callbacks.name: visible
callbacks.description: Called when window visibility changes.

callbacks.name: resize
callbacks.description: Called when the window is resized.

callbacks.name: quit
callbacks.description: Called when the window is about to close. Return true to cancel.

callbacks.name: init
callbacks.description: Called once when the engine initialises, before the first frame.

callbacks.name: ready
callbacks.description: Called once after init, when the window and GPU are ready.

callbacks.name: process
callbacks.description: Called every frame for game logic. `dt` is elapsed seconds.

callbacks.name: process_late
callbacks.description: Called every frame after process, for late updates (camera follow, etc).

callbacks.name: process_physics
callbacks.description: Called at fixed physics timestep rate.

callbacks.name: fixedUpdate
callbacks.description: Alias for process_physics — called at fixed timestep rate.

callbacks.name: draw_ui
callbacks.description: Called every frame after draw, for UI overlay rendering.

callbacks.name: exit
callbacks.description: Called when the engine is shutting down, after quit.

callbacks.name: touchpressed
callbacks.signature: function lurek.touchpressed(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch begins.

callbacks.name: touchmoved
callbacks.signature: function lurek.touchmoved(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch point moves.

callbacks.name: touchreleased
callbacks.signature: function lurek.touchreleased(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch ends.

callbacks.name: textedited
callbacks.description: Called when IME composition text changes.
